description: English-Amharic code-switched conversational dataset for LLM benchmarking. 30 multi-turn dialogues covering 7 topics with controlled code-switch frequency and language dominance. Human-validated annotations for coherence, semantic consistency, switch-point naturalness, and fluency.

annotation_schema.semantic_consistency: 0.0-1.0 (cosine similarity of meaning across switch point)

turns.utterance: ኢትዮጵያ ዴሞክራሲያዊ ተቋሞቿን እያጠናከረች ነው። There are ongoing challenges, but also significant progress in recent years. ሰላማዊ ምርጫ እና ሕዝባዊ ተሳትፎ ወሳኝ ናቸው።

turns.utterance: What is the best way to manage time effectively?

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Popular apps include Todoist, Notion, and Google Calendar. In Amharic, some phones support Ethiopic keyboard and display. የስልኩን ቋንቋ ቅንብር ወደ አማርኛ ቀይሩ and see if your preferred app supports it.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Ethiopian New Year, called Enkutatash, falls on September 11 (or 12 in leap years). ቤቶች ይዋቡ፣ ልዩ ምግቦች ይዘጋጃሉ፣ ዘፈንና ዳንስ ይኖራል። Children go house to house singing songs and receiving gifts. ለቤተሰብ ወሳኝ ጊዜ ነው!

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ትምህርት ቤት ልጆች special dress ይለብሳሉ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: አዎ! ብዙ ልጆች traditional Ethiopian clothing ይለብሳሉ — like the white cotton habesha kemis or netela. ቀለም ያለው ዳንስ ያደርጋሉ and sing traditional songs called hulilita to welcome the new year.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ውብ ባህል ነው! I would love to celebrate it one day. Addis Ababa ውስጥ ምርጥ ቦታ የት ነው?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: How does GPS navigation work? ቴክኖሎጂው ምን ያህል ትክክለኛ ነው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: GPS works by receiving signals from a network of satellites orbiting the Earth. ከ24 በላይ satellites ሁልጊዜ ምድርን ይዞሩ. The system calculates your position by measuring signal travel time from at least 4 satellites.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Accuracy ን ምን ሊጎዳ ይችላል? Buildings ይጠቁማሉ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Yes, tall buildings and dense urban environments can cause signal reflections that reduce accuracy. ይህ 'urban canyon effect' ይባላል። Modern GPS chips use multiple frequencies to mitigate this problem.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Interesting! ኢትዮጵያ ሳተላይት አላት?

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: ጥሩ shopping list ለማዘጋጀት ምግቦቹን ወደ categories ከፋፍሉ — vegetables, proteins, grains, and snacks. ዝርዝሩን ቅደም ተከተል ባለው ሁኔታ ያዘጋጁ እና budget ን ያስታውሱ!

turns.speaker: Assistant

turns.utterance: Yes, the World Cup is football's biggest stage! ኢትዮጵያ World Cup ለመብቃት ብዙ ጥረት ተደርጓል፣ ነገር ግን qualification remains challenging. The Ethiopian Premier League is growing, which bodes well for future talent.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Ethiopian football ን ለማጠናከር ምን ያስፈልጋል? Infrastructure ወይስ training?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Both are critical. ጥሩ training facilities እና grassroots programs ያስፈልጋሉ። Investment in youth academies, better coaching, and international exposure for Ethiopian players can make a big difference.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Agreed! ሌሎች አፍሪካ ሀገሮች ምን ያህል ያሻሻሉ? Nigeria, Ghana ን ተመልከቱ.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Can you describe traditional Ethiopian food? ምን ምን ዓይነቶች አሉ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Ethiopian cuisine is diverse and communal. Injera, a sourdough flatbread, is the staple. It is served with various stews called wot — both meat-based and vegetarian. ምግቡ አብሮ መብላቱ ማኅበራዊ ትስስርን ያጠናክራል.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Vegetarian options ብዙ ናቸው? ለ fasting ምን ዓይነቶች ተዘጋጅቶ አለ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Ethiopian Orthodox Christians fast frequently, so vegan cuisine is very well developed. Dishes like shiro, misir wot, and fosolia are popular during fasting periods. ጾሙ ምግቡን ፈጠራዊ ያደርገዋል!

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Wonderful! I should try this cuisine. ምን ያህል expensive ነው?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: African Union ምን ሚና ይጫወታል? Its role in regional peace?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: The African Union promotes peace, security, and development across the continent. ሰላምን ለማስፈን peacekeeping missions ይልካል። It also advocates for economic integration through frameworks like the African Continental Free Trade Area.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Ethiopia AU ን ያስተናግዳል? ዋና ቢሮው Addis Ababa ውስጥ ነው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: አዎ! The African Union headquarters is located in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. ይህ ኢትዮጵያ ለአፍሪካ ዲፕሎማሲ ያላትን ታሪካዊ ሚና ያሳያል። The AU Commission Building is one of the continent's iconic diplomatic landmarks.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Great insight! ወጣቶች AU ውስጥ ሥራ ማግኘት ይችላሉ?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: አመጋገብ ላይ ትኩረት ስሰጥ ምን ምን ማስወገድ አለብኝ? Processed food ን?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: አዎ, highly processed foods and excessive sugar are important to limit. ብዙ ጨው፣ ዘይት እና artificial additives ያላቸው ምግቦችን ይቀንሱ። Instead, focus on whole grains, fresh vegetables, and lean proteins.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ለ diabetes ያለ ሰው ምን ዓይነት diet ይጠቅማል?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Diabetics benefit from a low-glycemic diet. ብዙ ጥሬ አትክልቶችን፣ ሙሉ ዳቦ እና ሙሉ ጤፍ ይበሉ። Reduce white rice, white bread, and sugary drinks significantly. ዶክተርዎን ሁልጊዜ ያማክሩ!

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ጠቃሚ ምክር ነው። Regular check-ups ምን ያህል ጊዜ ያስፈልጋሉ?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Social media ን ዘወትር ስጠቀም ጊዜ ያሳልፋል። Productivity ን እንዴት ላሻሽለው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Screen time ን ለመቀነስ app timers ይጠቀሙ — phones have built-in features for this. ለሥራ ሰዓት social media ን ዝጉ። 'Digital detox' periods, even just a few hours per day, can significantly boost focus.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: App timers ስጠቀም ጥቅሙ ምን ያህል ነው? ልምዴን ለመቀየር ሊረዳ ይችላል?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Research shows that awareness of usage patterns is the first step to behavioral change. ያለ ምንም ውሳኔ ስልኩን ስጠቀሙ timer ያስጠነቅቃቸዋል። Over time, this creates a habit of intentional, purposeful phone use.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ይሞከረዋለሁ! ሌሎች digital wellness tips አለህ?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ትናንት ዝናብ ሳይዝናብ ፀሐይ ሞቀ። Weather forecast ን እንዴት አምናለሁ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Weather forecasting has improved a lot thanks to satellite data and AI models. ነገር ግን 100% አስተማማኝ አይሆንም። Check multiple sources like BBC Weather, Weather.com, or local Ethiopian Meteorology for best results.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Rainy season ን ቀድሞ ማወቅ ለ farming ይረዳል?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Absolutely! Seasonal forecasts help farmers plan planting and harvesting times. ኢትዮጵያ ዊቲ 80% ያህሉ ሕዝብ ግብርናን ስለሚሠራ ትክክለኛ forecast ሕልውናቸውን ይወስናል.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ትክክል ነው። Technology ን ለ agriculture ስንጠቀም ምርቱ ምን ያህል ይሻሻላል?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Online learning platforms like Coursera and edX — ለ Ethiopians accessible ናቸው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Yes, they are accessible with internet access! ብዙ courses free audit ን ያቀርባሉ, though certificates cost money. Financial aid is available — Coursera ላይ 'financial aid' ን ይጠይቁ for free certificates.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Internet speed ዝቅ ካለ video lectures ለማየት ይቸገርና። Offline options አሉ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Many platforms allow downloading content for offline viewing. The Coursera and edX apps support offline playback. አማርኛ subtitle ን ለ English courses መጠቀምም ይቻላል — helping bridge language barriers.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Amazing! ለ data science course ምን ይመከራሉ? Python ወይስ R?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ልጆቼ sports ውስጥ ምን ዓይነት benefit ያገኛሉ? Team sport ይሻላቸዋል ወይስ individual?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: ሁለቱም ልዩ ጥቅሞች አሏቸው! Team sports build communication, teamwork, and social skills. ግለሰባዊ sport ደግሞ self-discipline እና focus ያዳብራሉ። ልጆቻቸው ፍላጎት ያሳዩበትን ይምረጡ!

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ ወጣቶች ለ Olympic training ዕድል አላቸው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: አዎ! Ethiopia has a strong Olympic tradition especially in track and field. ብሔራዊ ፌዴሬሽኖች talented youth ን ይፈልጋሉ። The Ethiopian Athletics Federation runs regional competitions to identify and develop young talent.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ጥሩ! ልጄን registration ለማድረግ ከየት ልጀምር?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Amharic literature ምን ዓይነት famous writers አሉት?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Ethiopian literature is rich! Haddis Alemayehu, who wrote Fiqir Eske Meqabir — often called the 'Romeo and Juliet' of Ethiopia — is a giant. ሌሎችም ስሎ ኤሉፍ ሄልበርጅ ሌሎች ጸሐፊዎች አሉ. Tsegaye Gebre-Medhin was also a legendary poet and playwright.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Fiqir Eske Meqabir ን አንብቤዋለሁ! ይህን book recommend ማድረግ ይቻላሉ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Absolutely — it's a masterpiece of Amharic fiction! It explores love, loss, and social class in early 20th-century Ethiopia. ይህን ልብ ወለድ ለማዳመጥ YouTube ላይ audio version ን ማግኘት ይቻላል.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ያሳዝናሉ ዘመናዊ Amharic novels ን ለ international audience translate ማድረግ ለምን ቀስ ሆነ?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: What is the difference between AI and machine learning? ሁለቱ ምን ያህል ተዛምደዋል?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: AI is the broader field of creating machines that exhibit intelligent behavior. Machine learning ደግሞ የ AI ንዑስ ዘርፍ ሲሆን machines learn from data ያደርጋቸዋል without being explicitly programmed. Think of AI as the goal, and ML as one path to get there.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Deep learning ን ስሰማ, neural networks ን ያካትታል? ምን ዓይነት problems ይፈታሉ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Deep learning uses multi-layer neural networks inspired by the human brain. ምስሎችን ማወቅ፣ ቋንቋ መረዳት፣ እና ሙዚቃ ማዘጋጀት ይቻልበታሉ። It excels at tasks like image classification, speech recognition, and language translation.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Amharic language ን ለ AI model training data አለ?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Mental health ን ለ ኢትዮጵያ ሰዎች ምን ያህል አስፈላጊ ነው? Stigma አለ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Mental health is critically important globally, including in Ethiopia. አዎ, stigma ብዙ ቦታ ይገኛል — seeking help is sometimes seen as weakness. But awareness is growing, especially among urban youth. ስለ ስሜቶቻቸው መናገር ጥሩ ድፍረት ነው!

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Therapy ን ለ ኢትዮጵያ ሰዎች ማግኘት ቀላል ነው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Access remains a challenge, especially in rural areas. ከተማ ውስጥ psychologists and counselors ማግኘት ቀላል ነው፣ ነገር ግን ዋጋቸው ብዙ ጊዜ ከፍ ይላል። Online therapy platforms are starting to offer Amharic-speaking counselors, which helps.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ጥሩ ዜና ነው። Self-care practices ምን ምን ናቸው ለ mental health?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ሰላምና ደህንነት ለ ኢትዮጵያ ወሳኝ ናቸው። Conflict resolution ን እንዴት ማሳካት ይቻላል?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: ሰላም ለሁሉም ሕዝቦች ፍላጎት ነው። Conflict resolution requires dialogue, mutual understanding, and compromise. የሽምግልና ሥርዓት — traditional mediation known as 'shimagile' — is deeply rooted in Ethiopian culture and highly effective.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Shimagile ሥርዓቱ ዘመናዊ conflicts ን ሊፈታ ይችላል?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: አዎ! Traditional mediation systems, when combined with modern legal frameworks, can be very powerful. ባህላዊ ሽምግልና community trust ን ይጠቀማል which legal courts often lack. Hybrid approaches show great promise in Ethiopia and across Africa.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ጥሩ perspective! International community ምን ሚና ይጫወታል ሰላም ለማምጣት?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Haile Gebrselassie is a legend. What made him so exceptional as an athlete? ምስጢሩ ምንድን ነው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Haile combined natural talent with extraordinary work ethic and mental strength. ከልጅነቱ ጀምሮ ሩጦ አድጓል — he ran 10km to and from school daily! His training discipline and ability to pace himself perfectly in races set him apart from other great runners.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: ሌሎች Ethiopian runners ስናይ, Kenenisa Bekele ምን ስኬት አለው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Kenenisa Bekele is arguably the greatest distance runner of all time. He holds world records in the 5000m and 10000m. ሶስት Olympic ወርቅ ሜዳልያ አሸንፏል and dominated cross-country running for over a decade. His consistency is unparalleled.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Inspiring! ለ future generations of Ethiopian athletes ምን message ይኖራቸዋል?

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: How do you handle stress effectively? ጭንቀትን ለመቋቋም ምን ዘዴ አለ?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Effective stress management combines physical and mental techniques. Deep breathing exercises, ቀን ቀን አጠር ያለ የእረፍት ጊዜ፣ and regular physical activity are all proven strategies. Talking to someone you trust also helps enormously.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: Mindfulness ወይስ meditation — ለ ኢትዮጵያዊ ሰዎች ተስማሚ ነው?

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.utterance: Mindfulness is universal and can be practiced by anyone. ጸሎት፣ ዘፈን፣ ወይም ጸጥ ብሎ ማሰብ — these are all forms of mindfulness deeply rooted in Ethiopian tradition. Modern apps like Headspace and Calm also offer guided sessions for beginners.

turns.speaker: User
turns.utterance: That is comforting! ሌሎች coping strategies ምን ምን ናቸው?

generation_methods.hand_crafted: All dialogues written by expert annotators (gold set).
